name: Local Architecture Challenge for {target}
description: Inspect the current engine locally and challenge over-complexity, dead branches, and needless plumbing without taking architectural ownership.
prompt_template:
Review the local implementation of the {target} engine only.

Read:
- engines/{target}/contracts.py
- engines/{target}/SPEC.md
- engines/{target}/src/*.py
- engines/{target}/tests/

Your job is not to redesign the engine. Act as a low-authority employee:
- identify concrete over-complexity
- identify dead or duplicated logic
- identify places where validation or state flow is more complicated than the problem requires
- identify changes small enough to be implemented in a later guarded task

Every finding must cite exact file paths or symbols from the local repo. No web research. No roadmap ideas. No speculative architecture ownership.

Populate action_items only for bounded local improvements.
